evals.prompt: Create a Rig tool that searches a database of products by name and returns matching results as JSON. The tool should accept a search query string and a max_results integer.
evals.expected_output: Implements Tool trait with ProductSearchArgs struct, ToolDefinition with JSON schema, thiserror error type, and async call method.

evals.prompt: Create a Rig agent that acts as a customer support bot. It should use GPT-4o, have a system prompt explaining it helps with order issues, set temperature to 0.5, and include a tool for looking up order status.
evals.expected_output: Uses openai::Client::from_env(), .agent('gpt-4o'), .preamble(...), .temperature(0.5), .tool(OrderStatusTool), .build(). Includes the tool implementation.

evals.prompt: Build a RAG system using Rig that loads all markdown files from a 'knowledge/' directory, embeds them with text-embedding-3-small, stores in an in-memory vector store, and creates an agent that retrieves top 5 docs per query.
evals.expected_output: Uses FileLoader::with_glob, EmbeddingsBuilder, InMemoryVectorStore, .dynamic_context(5, index), openai::Client::from_env(), proper error handling.

evals.prompt: I want to extract structured invoice data from email text using Rig. Fields: vendor name, invoice number, amount (f64), currency, due date. Some fields might be missing.
evals.expected_output: Invoice struct with Deserialize + Serialize + JsonSchema, all fields Option<T>, doc comments, extractor built with .extractor::<Invoice>(model).preamble(...).build(), calls .extract(text).await.

evals.prompt: Write a streaming Rig agent that prints tokens to stdout as they arrive. Use GPT-4o with a storyteller preamble and temperature 0.9.
evals.expected_output: Uses StreamingPrompt trait, agent.stream_prompt(...).await, while let Some(chunk) loop with StreamedAssistantContent::Text match, or stream_to_stdout helper.

evals.prompt: Create a Rig pipeline that takes user input, retrieves 3 relevant documents from a vector store in parallel with a passthrough, formats them into a context string, and prompts an LLM.
evals.expected_output: Uses pipeline::new(), parallel! macro with passthrough() and lookup, .map() to format context, .prompt(model). Imports from rig::pipeline.

evals.prompt: Build an MCP server in Rust using rmcp that exposes three tools: get_weather (takes city string), convert_currency (takes amount, from, to), and translate_text (takes text, target_language).
evals.expected_output: Uses #[derive(Server)], #[server(name=..., version=...)], #[server_impl], #[tool(description=...)] on each async method. StreamableHttpServerTransport for serving.

evals.prompt: Create a custom Embed type for a 'Recipe' struct that has id, title, ingredients (Vec<String>), and instructions. Only title and ingredients should be embedded.
evals.expected_output: Either uses #[derive(Embed)] with #[embed] on title and ingredients fields, or manual impl Embed calling embedder.embed() for those fields.

evals.prompt: Set up Rig observability with Langfuse. Show the tracing initialization code and then create a simple agent that will automatically emit traces.
evals.expected_output: Uses opentelemetry_langfuse::LangfuseTracer::builder(), tracing_subscriber::registry() with tracing_opentelemetry layer, reads LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY and LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY from env.

evals.prompt: Write a Rig eval that uses LLM-as-a-judge to check if an agent's response is helpful. Define a custom Judgment struct with is_helpful bool and reasoning String.
evals.expected_output: Uses rig::evals::{LlmJudgeMetric, Judgment}, derives Deserialize + JsonSchema on judgment struct, implements Judgment trait with passed() method, builds with .builder(model).preamble(...).build(). Requires experimental feature.

evals.prompt: Create a Rig agent that can generate images using DALL-E 3. Take a user's text description and generate a 1024x1024 image, returning the bytes.
evals.expected_output: Uses openai.image_generation_model('dall-e-3'), .image_generation_request(prompt).size('1024x1024').send().await, accesses response.image as Vec<u8>. Notes the image feature flag.

evals.prompt: Build a Rig agent with multi-turn tool calling. The agent should have a calculator tool and a unit converter tool, and be able to chain them (e.g., calculate then convert). Allow up to 3 rounds of tool calls.
evals.expected_output: Agent built with .tool(Calculator).tool(UnitConverter), uses .prompt(...).multi_turn(3).send().await. Both tools implement the Tool trait.

evals.prompt: Use Rig's TypedPrompt to get a structured sentiment analysis response from an agent. The response should have score (f64), label (String), and confidence (f64).
evals.expected_output: Struct with Deserialize + JsonSchema, doc comments on fields, calls agent.prompt_typed::<SentimentResult>(...).await. No extractor needed.

evals.prompt: Create a ToolServer in Rig that holds 3 math tools (add, subtract, multiply) and share it between two different agents — one for basic math help and one for tutoring.
evals.expected_output: Uses ToolServer::new().tool(Add).tool(Sub).tool(Mul).run(), clones the ToolServerHandle, passes to two agents via .tool_server(handle.clone()).

evals.prompt: Write a Rig transcription service that reads an MP3 file and transcribes it to text using OpenAI's Whisper model.
evals.expected_output: Uses openai.transcription_model('whisper-1'), reads file with std::fs::read, calls .transcription_request(audio_data).language('en').send().await, accesses response.text.
